name: testWaitForParallel
title: testWaitForParallel
syntax: long testWaitForParallel(long handle, dword timeout); // form 1
long testWaitForParallel(long handles[], dword timeout) // form 2
description: Waits until execution of the thread specified via the handle parameter has finished. In case the thread already finished execution, the function returns instantly.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Handle of the thread to wait for.

parameters.name: handles[]
parameters.description: Handles of the threads to wait for.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum time to wait [ms]. Specify 0 to wait without timeout.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
